race.description: Brisbane Waters Glass Provincial Mdn Hcp
race.comment: EASTERN BEAUTY (11) resumes for her second campaign after closing strongly at her second career start for a sound second over 1200m at Goulburn on a soft (7) surface last February. Back with the two trials and the booking of McEvoy from a good draw points to a positive return. NO LIMITS (5) Exceedance two-year-old gelding from Birthday Girl on debut for the Kris Lees stable. Won his latest trial by a big space over 1000m at Wyong. Can win a race of this calibre first-up. SKYRISE (9) Overshare two-year-old filly on debut for the Kim Waugh stable. Has shown potential in all her trials and has claims despite drawing poorly. PUBLIC SAFETY (6) Home Affairs gelding from Buzzards Bay on debut for the Blake Ryan yard. Trialled well and should handle the conditions. Respect.
